speaker: MATT
raw_text: Ten. So you have ten hit points. And you come to consciousness.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I stand up, and I look at Grog. And in Giant I say, "'Sup."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Damn, you be talkin' my lingo!

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to spit on him while I'm still standing. And I'm just going to flop on my back, turn back into a dwarf. Be like, "Hey, you guys want to get a beer?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are two imps in the chamber. But they both turn invisible as soon as this happens. And they're attempting to escape as the flame wall disappears, and you see Taryon bleeding out on the ground. Next to his superheated--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh. I land and Lay on Hands

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Yeah, you're close enough to do so.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we just toss him in the blood.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So how much do you give him?
